name: Jaguar Man
description: Jaguar Man is a low-grade Divine Spirit, worshipped in Mesoamerican civilizations of old as a symbol of war and death. It is often referred to as Nagual, a human being capable of shapeshifting into a Jaguar.
mediaTitles: Fate/Grand Order Absolute Demonic Front: Babylonia
Fate/Grand Order: Himuro no Tenchi - 7-nin no Saikyou Gijin-hen
searchTerms: Fate/Grand Order Absolute Demonic Front: Babylonia
Fate/Grand Order: Himuro no Tenchi - 7-nin no Saikyou Gijin-hen

name: Kazuki Yasaka
description: Kazuki Yasaka, a second-year middle school student. He used to love soccer and used to have a bright personality. ~!Due to the feeling of guilt of causing his step-brother to lose his ability to walk in an accident, he desperately seeks redemption in the form of "connecting with his brother" by crossdressing and pretending to be Azuma Sara, a local idol and his brother's favorite idol and talk to him everyday without fail through "Lucky Item Selfies".!~

name: Kohina Hiruko
description: Kohina Hiruko is a 10-year-old girl, who, despite her petty physique, is extremely powerful. Kohina, like her father, gives off a cruel psyche and will annihilate those that stand in her way without any remorse. She also displays a revengeful persona against those that have previously corrupted her plans or saved someone she aimed to kill. When said events happen, she loses her cool and badmouths the ones she fights, calling them weak. (Source: Black Bullet Wikia)

name: Lappland
description: __Place of Birth:__ Siracusa Lappland's real identity is unknown, her background a mystery. She has demonstrated impressive destructive prowess in tactical assaults and search-and-destroy missions. She is currently a special ops Operator for Rhodes Island.

name: Marco
description: Marco has the mental age of a kid, but possesses a monstrous strength that is far beyond any ordinary human being. Due to his ruthless and savage upraising by his father, Marco was conditioned to turn into his bloodthirsty Rodem persona whenever he was stabbed with a needle, turning him into a being that would mercilessly kill everyone in his path.However, since Marco joined Madarame Baku's side, he has avoided his intent to kill, even when reverting to his Rodem persona.

name: Maria
description: __Height__: 168 cm Maria is a pink haired woman who runs a nearby farm where all the Arakawa residents get their dairy and produce from. Whilst having a beautiful appearance, she casually passes out incredibly harsh insults to other people and is a sadist. She met Sister during the last war that they had and she was an opposing spy that tried to get information from him.
mediaTitles: Arakawa Under the Bridge x Bridge
searchTerms: Arakawa Under the Bridge x Bridge

name: Mayu
description: She is a young girl, abandoned by her mother and a victim of sexual abuse by her stepfather. She has run away from home and is homeless at the start of the series, subsisting on bread crusts she is given at a local bakery under the pretence that they are for the small puppy that accompanies her. She found and named the puppy "Wanta." She ends up living with Kohta and Yuka as her legal guardians. Mayu befriends Nana and tries to take her under her wing. (Source: Wikipedia)
mediaTitles: Elfen Lied: Just How Did the Young Girl Arrive at Those Feelings?
searchTerms: Elfen Lied: Just How Did the Young Girl Arrive at Those Feelings?

name: Miyabi Serizawa
description: Miyabi Serizawa is a college student and actress attending Meiji University, a prominent member of the college drama club Forester who has been the lead actress in many of its productions and the childhood friend of Yuka Kusanagi.
mediaTitles: Domestic na Kanojo: Koushiki Usui Hon
searchTerms: Domestic na Kanojo: Koushiki Usui Hon

name: Muku Sakisaka
description: He's a Summer Troupe actor. He is a kind-hearted and modest boy with the motto "doing one good deed each day". Muku treats his Shoujo manga like his bible, admires princes and dreams of being a prince-like man one day. Before he joined the Mankai Company, he participated in the track and field club, which he later had to resign. To achieve his dream via a different method, he tried his best in the summer troupes audition.

name: Nanana Ryuugajou
description: The female heroine. Nanana is the ghost bound to Juugo's room since her murder 10 years ago. Unable to rest in peace, Nanana spends all her time playing video and online games and eating her favorite and only food, pudding. She is thus forced to live as a NEET, and although she was never bored with it, she was actually lonely until Juugo rented the room. Living as a human, Nanana was an exceptional student who was extremely adventurous, and she along with seven other exceptional high school stud

name: Naoki Satou
description: [Shun](https://anilist.co/character/323205/Shun-Satou)'s senpai. She's cheerful, carefree and more than a little eccentric, being the president of her own "Hyper Go-Home Club", which she immediately recruits Shun for on their first day of high school. Despite her quirks and detour-loving personality she is kind, attentive and gets along well with everyone at school, quickly becoming close with Shun and capturing his interest.

name: Naomi Orthmann
description: Naomi is an agent with the Department of Truth, whose job is to oversee android activity. While she seems lighthearted, she has a calm and rational approach. ~!It is later revealed that she is a nean created by the visitors.!~

name: Noe Isurugi
description: Noe Isurugi is an odd girl at Shin'ichirō's school. He first meets her up in a tree where she is picking silverberries for a chicken she named Raigomaru in a coop on a campus. Shin'ichiro ends up having to catch her as she jumps from the tree since she was stuck and could not get down on her own. She likes chickens, though would only feed one of them since she says "it could fly" while the other cannot. ~!After the chicken gets killed by a raccoon, Noe becomes saddened, but does not cry because
mediaTitles: true tears x Hanasaku Iroha x TARITARI: Utopia
searchTerms: true tears x Hanasaku Iroha x TARITARI: Utopia

name: Noel Izumi
description: [Shintarou's](https://anilist.co/character/316296/) classmate who works at the same family restaurant. When she closed her heart in order to hide her identity, she was rumored to be the "Ice Queen" due to her cool appearance. ~!She is actually a yuki onna and when she gets emotional, she causes a blizzard.!~
mediaTitles: Studio Apartment, Good Lighting, Angel Included
Studio Apartment, Good Lighting, Angel Included

name: Noriko Kamomebata
description: Noriko Kamomebata or as she likes to be called, Moka, is shown to be childish and whiney. Her appearance is intended to make her look like a princess who is in need of a "prince". Mugi is her childhood friend who she fell in love with. Although she may be annoying, she seems to care for others and like to see them happy. Her size makes her look younger than she actually is.

name: Rick Gladiatol
nativeName: リック・グラディアートル
description: At the age of 30, he left his job as a guild clerk to pursue his dream of becoming an adventurer. After undergoing two years of "terrifying beyond hellish training" from his seniors from the Orichalcum Fist party, the strongest on the continent, he showed remarkable growth. The days of continuous death and resurrection during training have left him deeply traumatized.
mediaTitles: The Ossan Newbie Adventurer, Trained to Death by the Most Powerful Party, Became Invincible
The Ossan Newbie Adventurer, Trained to Death by the Most Powerful Party, Became Invincible

Ryotaro is Nanako's hard-working single father, but mostly spends his time away from family due to the murders. Adachi is his partner. He is obsessed with a hit-and-run that killed his wife, and continues to investigate it, to the neglect of his daughter. name: Takashi Sugiyama
description: Height: 167 cm (5'6) Takashi Sugiyama is a third-year business student at Kansei University. He is the resident of room 205 at Chikuseisou. Generally considered an honor student by the other residents of Chikuseisou, Takashi is an earnest student from the Yamagata Prefecture- a mountainy region. He used to walk ten kilometers through the mountains to get to school and back every day. He was the first convinced by Haiji to give running a chance and has been a significant driving force behind the

name: Taku Morisaki
description: Main protagonist. Taku, needing money for the school's trip to Hawaii, took his restaurant busboy job to offset the expense, at the cost of falling grades and his teachers'; disapproval. He voiced his disapproval of cancelling the school trip in front of the whole school. Is there when Rikako plans to go to Tokyo, lends her money for the tickets (although he didn't know of her plans).
